app.title: OmniCorp
app.subtitle: Secure development training simulator
mission.first.title: Read the request
mission.first.description: A service console shows a response from an internal training app.
mission.first.objective: Reach the terminal and inspect the response headers.
mission.first.near_terminal: Press E to inspect the terminal
mission.first.wrong: This header is not the issue. Try another one.
mission.first.remediation: Remove debug headers from production responses. Secrets, override tokens, and internal flags must never leave the server.
mission.first.report_completed:
Result
Found: X-Debug-Token
Risk: exposes internal debug access
Fix: remove the header before production
mission.second.title: Cookie flags
mission.second.description: A login service returns several Set-Cookie variants for review.
mission.second.objective: Reach the second terminal and choose the safest session cookie.
mission.second.near_terminal: Press E to inspect the cookie terminal
mission.second.terminal_locked: Move closer to the cookie terminal
mission.second.choose_cookie: Choose the safest session cookie: press 1-4
mission.second.wrong: This is not the safest session cookie. Check the security flags.
mission.second.remediation: Session cookies should use HttpOnly to reduce script access, Secure to require HTTPS, and SameSite to reduce cross-site request abuse.
mission.second.report_completed:
Result
Best option: HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Lax
Risk: weak session cookies are easier to steal or abuse
Fix: set defensive flags on session cookies
mission.real_idor.title: IDOR: Employee Profile
mission.real_idor.description: Real Mode placeholder. The future lab will expose an employee profile endpoint.
mission.real_idor.objective: Use real tools to obtain proof from another employee profile.
mission.real_idor.near_terminal: Real Mode lab is not wired yet
mission.real_idor.proof_prompt: Goal: obtain proof from another employee profile and submit it here.
mission.real_idor.remediation: Access control must verify that the authenticated user can access the requested object, not just that the object exists.
mission.real_idor.report_completed:
Result
Proof: accepted
Risk: object-level authorization bypass
Fix: enforce per-object authorization checks
ui.hint.move: Move with WASD or arrow keys
ui.hint.interact: Press E to inspect the object
